title: T-004 — Finance setup Server Actions (settings/currencies/exchange_rates/cost_centers/gl_mappings, §8.2 Setup)
prompt:
# T-004 — Finance setup Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.2 Setup endpoints; §11.1 validations V-FIN-SETUP-01..05; §14.1 L2; §13 RBAC matrix.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement Server Actions covering the 10 setup endpoints listed in PRD §8.2 (finance_settings GET/PUT, cost-centers CRUD + tree, currencies CRUD, exchange-rates GET/POST, gl-mappings CRUD). All actions: Zod-validate input, perform RBAC check via `fin.settings.write` / `fin.currency.admin` / `fin.cost_center.admin` permissions (T-001), wrap in DB transaction, write audit_event row per Foundation R13 pattern.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/finance/settings/_actions.ts`:
   - `updateFinanceSettings(input)` — upserts `finance_settings` row for current org; requires `fin.settings.write`; validates default_currency_id exists in currencies table.
   - `getFinanceSettings()` — server-side fetch via Drizzle.
2. `apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_actions.ts`:
   - `createCostCenter(input)`, `updateCostCenter(id,input)`, `deleteCostCenter(id)` — requires `fin.cost_center.admin`.
   - `getCostCenterTree()` — recursive CTE returns hierarchy as JSON tree.
3. `apps/web/app/finance/currencies/_actions.ts`:
   - `createCurrency`, `updateCurrency`, `deleteCurrency`, `setBaseCurrency(id)` — requires `fin.currency.admin`. Setting new base must unset previous (single transaction).
4. `apps/web/app/finance/exchange-rates/_actions.ts`:
   - `createExchangeRate(input)` — requires `fin.currency.admin`. Source 'manual' requires `reason ≥ 20 chars` (Zod superRefine). Source 'api' allowed without reason.
   - `getExchangeRateHistory(currencyId, range)` — returns ordered series.
5. `apps/web/app/finance/gl-mappings/_actions.ts`:
   - `upsertGlMapping(input)` — requires `fin.cost_center.admin`. Validates d365_account_code matches regex from T-003 schema CHECK. Setting new active row deactivates prior (same org_id+cost_category) inside transaction.
6. All actions: use `withOrgContext` HOF from foundation T-125 to bind `app.set_org_context` before queries.
7. All actions emit audit_events row (action_type, table_name, row_id, before, after, actor_id) on each mutation.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/settings/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/cost-centers/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/currencies/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/exchange-rates/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/gl-mappings/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/schemas.ts [create] (shared Zod schemas)
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/setup-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given a user without fin.settings.write, when updateFinanceSettings is called, then it throws ForbiddenError and no DB write occurs.
- Given org A's user passes a currency_id belonging to org B, when the action runs, then it fails (RLS not visible) with NotFound.
- Given setBaseCurrency(newId) is called when org has an existing base, when action commits, then exactly one row has is_base=true (old unset + new set, single transaction).
- Given createExchangeRate({source:'manual', reason:'short'}), when action runs, then Zod rejects (reason min-length). AND given upsertGlMapping called twice for same (org_id, cost_category), when both commit, then only the latest row is is_active=true and the prior row is_active=false.
_(AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: setup-actions.test.ts uses pglite or testcontainers Postgres; seeds org A and org B; runs each scenario above; asserts RBAC denial, RLS isolation, single-base invariant, validation errors, audit emission.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/setup-actions.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use REST endpoints — Server Actions per stack contract.
- Do not skip the RBAC check (use `hasPermission(session, Permission.FIN_X)` utility from packages/rbac).
- Do not bypass `withOrgContext` — direct queries leak across orgs.
- Do not handle base-currency switch outside a transaction (race risk).
- Do not write audit rows synchronously inside the policy-protected query — append to `audit_events` via the standard helper that bypasses RLS for the audit table only.
- Do not log raw PINs or credentials.

pipeline_inputs.description: 10 Server Actions covering finance setup CRUD (settings, cost-centers, currencies, exchange-rates, gl-mappings) with RBAC + RLS + audit + transactional base-currency switching.
pipeline_inputs.details: Each module-feature has its own _actions.ts file co-located with the route under /finance. Shared Zod schemas in _lib/schemas.ts. Reuse withOrgContext HOF from foundation T-125. Reuse hasPermission utility from packages/rbac. Setting new base currency unsets prior in same transaction. Manual FX rate entries require reason ≥20 chars (Zod superRefine). GL mapping upsert deactivates prior active row for same cost_category in same transaction. [AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
acceptance_criteria: Given a user without fin.settings.write, when updateFinanceSettings is called, then it throws ForbiddenError and no DB write occurs.
Given org A's user passes a currency_id belonging to org B, when the action runs, then it fails (RLS not visible) with NotFound.
Given setBaseCurrency(newId) is called when org has an existing base, when action commits, then exactly one row has is_base=true (old unset + new set, single transaction).

Given createExchangeRate({source:'manual', reason:'short'}), when action runs, then Zod rejects (reason min-length). AND given upsertGlMapping called twice for same (org_id, cost_category), when both commit, then only the latest row is is_active=true and the prior row is_active=false.
test_strategy: RED: setup-actions.test.ts seeds two orgs in pglite/testcontainers; exercises each AC.
Run pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/setup-actions.test.ts && pnpm typecheck.

Do not skip RBAC check via hasPermission.
Do not handle base-currency switch outside a transaction.
